title: rubus × flavicomus
intro: Rubus × flavicomus, also known as the yellow-flowering raspberry, is a hybrid of the wild raspberry species native to eastern Asia and North America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × flavicomus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
